title: Philanthropy Archives - Murthy Law Firm | U.S Immigration Law
content:
## A Vote for Murthy is a Vote for Good
A few weeks ago, a member of our Admin team told us about the FedEx Small Business Grant and suggested that we should enter. If the Murthy Law Firm receives this grant, we would extend another annual day of service to our employees. Our Philanthropy...

## More on Sheela Murthy’s New Biography
A January 21, 2021 book club, hosted by the Women United group of the United Way of Central Maryland, discussed the new biography of Sheela Murthy by Adithi Rao. In an interview with Sheela, conducted by Heidi Daniel, President / CEO of the Enoch Pratt...

## Breaking Boundaries: A Second Biography that Includes Sheela Murthy
The New Year brings with it a new biography, and Sheela Murthy is among five IndianAmerican women leaders whose stories are its focus. Breaking Boundaries also features Jagruti Panwala, Gauthami Vemula Qeijo, Dr. Nimisha Shukla, and Dr. Madhulika Guha Thakurta. Each woman was born in...

## “Being Sheela” a Biography Recently Published by Harper Collins
The critically acclaimed biography “Being Sheela: The Life Journey of an Immigration Attorney” has recently been released by Harper Collins.What is “Being Sheela” about? It explores the life of a woman who has made it her purpose to strive for a better world. With insightful detours...

## A Matter of Life and Death
The news media have jumped at everything 2020 has thrown at them; but without much follow-up. To be fair, there has been a lot to monitor at this unprecedented time. As an immigrant-owned law firm focused on the practice of U.S. immigration law, there has...

## Murthy Law Firm Gives Back to the Community
Last week, ten Murthy Law Firm employees spent a rewarding day of service, volunteering at the Baltimore Humane Society. In between raking leaves, cleaning cages, and cuddling the adoptable dogs, cats, rabbits, and hamsters, the group learned how the organization finds good homes for countless...

## Baltimore Speaker Series: Murthy Sponsors Cameron, Former Prime Minister of U.K.
Murthy Law Firm founder and president, Sheela Murthy, met the latest eminent guest to take the stage for Stevenson University’s Baltimore Speaker Series, October 3, 2017. The Murthy Law Firm proudly sponsored this event, and Murthy – a longtime supporter of Stevenson University, and former...

## New Documentary Series Explores the Lives of Accomplished IndianAmericans, Starting With Sheela Murthy
The Indian-based cable and satellite television channel Zee TV launched its latest series, Those Who Made It, on Saturday, October 14, 2017. Each 30-minute episode of the documentary-styled series explores the life of a different IndianAmerican who has risen to the top of his or...

## Newly Launched: SHEELAMURTHY.com
While MurthyDotCom remains the spot on the web to find the latest news on immigration, research U.S. immigration law, and engage with the Murthy Law Firm, we have a new website to share with you the breadth of Sheela Murthy's community activities. Visitors to MurthyDotCom...

## Annual Festival Presents Exciting New Films from South Asia
The 6th annual DC South Asian Film Festival (DCSAFF) brought a variety of compelling new feature length films, shorts, and documentaries to the area this past weekend. The MurthyNAYAK Foundation is a sponsor of the event, and Murthy Law Firm founder and president Sheela Murthy...
